authentication_mode: UNVERIFIED: do not authenticate or inspect credentials during offline preparation
approval_mode: documented plan mode; local behavior UNVERIFIED
sandbox_mode: documented --sandbox capability; not enabled and Windows behavior UNVERIFIED
notes: The executable path, installed version, authentication state, proxy routing, certificate trust, expected hosts, and command behavior are UNVERIFIED.
The official CLI documents --prompt, --output-format json, --approval-mode, and --include-directories. This template must be checked with local --help after approved installation.
HTTP_PROXY and HTTPS_PROXY plus NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS are candidate test variables only; successful interception and CA trust require empirical validation.
No credential environment variable is supplied by this adapter.
limitations: No Gemini executable has been installed, authenticated, invoked, or observed by this harness.
The official documentation reviewed does not provide a standalone noninteractive authentication-status command; authentication state is UNVERIFIED.
An empty expected_vendor_hosts list deliberately avoids treating unvalidated host guesses as capture expectations.
